summary: Frontend-only verification of Ledgerly's four new features (PDF export, recurring invoices, payment reminders, dashboard/reports chart). All 8 requested checks pass end-to-end via real UI gestures. Login OK as demo@ledgerly.app. Dashboard shows the 'Start from a template' card (quick-start-templates) with 12 industry options; picking 'plumbing' and clicking 'Use template' created a new draft (EST-00003) with 4 pre-filled line items and navigated to /quotes/{id}. download-estimate-pdf href = /api/quotes/{id}/pdf returned 200 application/pdf (3185 B). On invoice INV-00001, the invoice-actions panel exposes Download PDF, Send payment reminder, and the Recurring section. Invoice PDF fetch: 200 application/pdf (3140 B). Reminder click produced invoice-action-msg 'Reminder logged (email not_configured)' — fail-soft path as expected (Resend key unset). Selecting Monthly + Make recurring updated the panel to show recurring-off-btn and generate-next-btn. Clicking Generate next now navigated to a newly created invoice (INV-00002) at /invoices/cmrtv2im9000xm8e8ussini5t. Reports page shows revenue-chart with 6 month bars (Feb–Jul 2026) rendered as div bars with per-month tooltips, plus AR aging and 4 tables. Zero runtime console errors on dashboard, estimate detail, invoice detail, and reports.
critical_code_review_comments: QuickStartTemplates.tsx: correctly resets busy state only on error path; on success it navigates before re-enabling (fine because component unmounts). Good.

InvoiceActions.tsx: the reminder flow correctly falls back to window.prompt when no customerEmail is on file and cancels cleanly if the user provides no email. Message text distinguishes 'emailed' vs 'logged (email not_configured)'. Solid UX.

InvoiceActions.tsx: `useState(RECUR_INTERVALS...)` — the local variable is named `interval` which shadows the browser global `setInterval` name; harmless here but consider renaming to `recurInterval` for clarity.

Reports revenue-chart uses div-based bars with inline style height% and title tooltips — simple, dependency-free, no console errors. Accessible improvement: adding aria-label per bar (e.g., 'May 2026: $0.00') would improve screen-reader support (title tooltips are not universally announced).
During the first estimate-detail load there was ONE isolated 404 network resource (no runtime error, no pageerror) — could not reproduce on subsequent loads. Non-blocking; noted for awareness.
test_credentials: Owner demo@ledgerly.app / demo-demo-demo — used via UI login.
seed_data_creation: Test run created persistent state in the Northwind Studio workspace: (1) EST-00003 draft 'Plumbing estimate' with 4 line items via the template starter, (2) INV-00001 was set to recurring=monthly and now has 1 reminderCount, (3) INV-00002 was auto-generated by the Generate next now action. Main agent may want to `npm run db:seed` to restore the pristine demo state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All four features (PDF export, recurring invoices, payment reminders, dashboard revenue chart) verified via UI. Nav test-ids used: nav-invoices, nav-reports. Component test-ids exercised: quick-start-templates, template-industry-select, create-from-template-btn, download-estimate-pdf, invoice-actions, download-invoice-pdf, send-reminder-btn, invoice-action-msg, recur-interval-select, recurring-on-btn, generate-next-btn, recurring-off-btn, revenue-chart. If retest is needed after reseed, the seeded IDs will change but selectors above are stable. Preview URL: https://8a1fcd27-2686-4210-bc8e-4cecf5167001.preview.emergentagent.com

measurements.console_errors_estimate_detail: 1 resource 404 observed once on new quote load; no runtime/pageerror; non-reproducible on subsequent loads
